title: Pest monitoring: main difference between conventional and automated monitoring systems
subtitle: Spremljanje škodljivcev: glavne razlike med konvencionalnimi in avtomatskimi sistemi spremljanja škodljivcev
description: A practice abstract comparing conventional and automated pest monitoring systems in vegetable production. It highlights the additional requirements for automated devices such as reliable power supply and connectivity, and underscores the benefits of automated data recording, reporting, and forecasting for better pest management decisions.
